title: Computers Around Us
subtitle: See Computers Everywhere!
overview: Students explore how computers are used in daily life at home, school, banks, hospitals, shops, railway stations and more through pictures, videos and real-life examples.

images._note: Add real classroom photos and computer usage examples from daily life.

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Family using laptop at home
gallery.caption: Computers help us study, watch videos and play games at home

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Students in school computer lab
gallery.caption: Students learning on computers in school

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Bank employee using desktop computer
gallery.caption: Banks use computers to manage money safely

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Doctor using computer in hospital
gallery.caption: Hospitals use computers for patient records

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Billing counter computer in shop
gallery.caption: Shops use computers for billing and payments
Railway stations use computers for ticket booking

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Smartphone being used by students
gallery.caption: Smartphones are also small computers

keyTopics: Computers in railway stations and airports
Smartphones and tablets are also computers
How computers make work easier and faster

activity.title: Find Computers Around You
steps: Students identify where computers are used
Discuss what the computer is doing there
Match computer pictures with correct places
Students draw one place where they saw a computer

quiz.q: Where do we commonly use computers at home?
quiz.explanation: Computers at home help us study, watch videos, play games and communicate.
Schools use computers for learning, projects and online education.
Banks use computers to store account information and manage transactions.

quiz.q: Which device is also a type of computer?
quiz.explanation: Smartphones are small computers we use every day.
Hospitals use computers to store patient information and reports.

quiz.q: Where can we book train tickets using computers?
quiz.explanation: Railway stations use computers for ticket booking and schedules.
Computers save time and make many tasks easier.

quiz.q: Which place usually has a computer billing machine?
quiz.explanation: Shops use computers for billing and payments.

quiz.q: What can students do using computers?
quiz.explanation: Computers help students in many different ways.
Today computers are used almost everywhere in daily life.
